Pattern constructors for list, grid, and radial manifestations.
hexcasting.category.manifestation_intent: Interactive intent primitives for manifested spells.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intro: I've long suspected a link between media and the mind, but only recently have I begun to understand its depths. Constraining the media into patterns with intent makes it manifest, forming structures that can be perceived.$(br2)More curious still, these constructs seem capable of accepting intent. By imposing order upon them, I can compel them to carry thought forward, translating decision into action.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.menus.crea: Takes a list of intentions, a menu title and manifests a list menu.
Takes a list of intentions, a menu title, and a number of columns to manifest a grid menu. Columns are limited to 1-10.
Takes a list of intentions and a menu title to manifest a radial button menu. Radial menus require button intents only; any non-button intent causes a mishap.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intents_in: An Intent is an imposition of will on the media, shaping it into a vessel awaiting a spark of interaction to awaken it.$(br2)By themselves, intents are inert. A button waits for a press, an input for text, a slider for a nudge, and a dropdown for a selection. But once roused, they execute their patterns with the fervor of a cast hex.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intents.in: Creates a button from a list of patterns and a label. When clicked, the button casts the patterns.
Creates an input field from a label. Entered text is pushed to the stack of an executed action, like from a button.
Creates a slider from min, max, current values, and a label. The chosen value is pushed to the stack of an executed action.
Creates a non-interactive section from a label, acting as a sub heading.
Creates a dropdown from a list of options and a label. The selected option is pushed to the stack of an executed action.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intents.pr: A shaped will to be present at a distant place, bound to a position and facing.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intents.ma: Manifests or refreshes an Echo at a target position in one of three slots (0..2). The second argument selects the slot number. Each action costs one dust-equivalent media, hits against the echo remove 5 media, and when media is depleted the echo shatters with amethyst resonance.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intents.li: Manifests a Relay linked from a destination vector to a target vector. It manifests on the face of the destination vector cast is looking at. Optionally takes a redstone signal strength (0-15) to emit when the relay is activated.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intents.un: Clears an existing link from a Manifest Relay block.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intents.op: A threshold is a boundary where intent manifests. To cross it is to make the caster's will real.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intents.de: Unravels manifestation blocks in a radius around a vector. Only blocks your will can edit are affected.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.splinters_: Splinters are delayed manifestations: seeded now, cast later. They can be renewed, tracked, and cleared as your work evolves.
Queues a splinter at a position with a delay in ticks and a payload list of iotas to execute when it resolves.
Rebuilds an existing splinter at a new position and delay, preserving its payload.
Returns the location of the currently executing splinter as a vector.
Destroys all active splinters bound to your will.
Creates a temporary visual trail at a position, blending from one color vector to another over a tick duration. The id groups updates and type optionally selects the particle style.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.contained_: A contained splinter anchors delayed casting to a Splinter Caster, letting circles hold intent until conditions are right.
Place a focus iota in the Splinter Caster, then provide circle flow to manifest and maintain the anchored splinter.
hexcasting.mishap.manifestation.menu_ope: Manifestation backlash: this menu is being reopened too quickly.
hexcasting.mishap.manifestation.radial_m: Radial manifestation requires every entry to be an intent button.
hexcasting.mishap.manifestation.intent_r: Manifest Relay cannot manifest on that face; the space is blocked or unsupported.
Manifest Relay signal strength must be between 0 and 15.
hexcasting.mishap.manifestation.portal_n: Manifest Threshold cannot manifest. The space is occupied.
